steps.title: Use the first equation to identify x
steps.content: The first equation is $x = 5$, which directly gives the $x$-coordinate of the solution—no solving needed.

steps.title: Substitute x into the second equation to find y
steps.content:
The second equation is $y = x - 8$. Substitute $x = 5$:
$$y = 5 - 8 = -3$$
The solution to the system is $(5, -3)$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
